query: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE gracefully_closed_at IS NULL AND stale_detected_at IS NULL) AS "open_epochs!", count(*) FILTER (WHERE stale_detected_at IS NOT NULL AND acknowledged_at IS NULL) AS "unresolved_epochs!", COALESCE(sum(GREATEST(accepted - persisted - abandoned, 0)) FILTER (WHERE stale_detected_at IS NOT NULL AND acknowledged_at IS NULL), 0) AS "unresolved_lower_bound!", (SELECT count(*) FROM request_metadata_ingestion_gaps WHERE certainty = 'lower_bound'::request_metadata_gap_certainty) + (SELECT COALESCE(sum(uncertain_gap_count), 0) FROM request_metadata_gap_hourly) AS "historical_uncertain_gap_count!" FROM request_metadata_gateway_epochs
